Off Calendar Mar-22-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - JAVIER RIVERA AND EVA RIVERA, TEL. NO. 367-7413, DEFENDANTS APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - NOTICE GIVEN TO THE OTHER PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS JAVIER RIVERA, ALEJANDRO RIVERA AND EVA RIVERA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED; 5 DAYS TO ANSWER.
